message:
test(linalg): add inv_right_identity and cholesky_reconstructs metamorphic

Two new metamorphic relations (7 fixtures) for the linalg suite:

- inv_right_identity (4 cases, 2x2/2x2 ill-conditioned/3x3/4x4 diag-heavy):
  verifies A · inv(A) ≈ I within scale-sensitive tolerance. Uses a new
  square_matmul_flat helper so the harness can multiply n×n row-major
  matrices without depending on fnp_linalg matmul exports.

- cholesky_reconstructs_spd (3 cases, simple 2x2 SPD / textbook
  positive-definite / near-identity): verifies L · Lᵀ ≈ A where
  L = cholesky_2x2(A, "L"). Catches loss of Cholesky factor fidelity.

43 linalg_metamorphic cases total (up from 36).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
